Vata: Write three intentions by hand — then read them aloud to the dark
Warm sesame-oil foot massage before bed
One bowl of warm kitchari eaten in silence
Pitta: A small fire or candle ceremony — burn one thing you release
Cooling rose tea; write what you will STOP striving for
Kapha: Movement first: shake, dance, walk — then set intentions
Spiced honey water; name one new thing you will begin

Vata: Gratitude inventory: ten things, spoken slowly
Warm bath with salt; let the month drain out
Early night — the full moon agitates Vata; protect sleep
Pitta: Forgiveness practice: one person, fully released
Moon-bathe: stand in the light 5 minutes, cool the fire
Sweet foods, no argument tonight — declare a truce
Kapha: Release ceremony: write what is complete, tear it
Sing or chant — move the lake of the chest
Share a meal; the Kapha full moon is for gathering
